creator: jacek@ipv6.jacek.it.pl
text:
Further debugging:

scp from src_addr to dst_addr which pf debug enabled shows

pf: BAD ICMP 2:0 some_router -> src_addr
state: TCP src_addr[50400] src_addr[50400]
dst_addr[22] [lo=2463013638 high=2463020758 win=32844
modulator=0 wscale=1] [lo=2412460872 high=2412526560 win=1278 modulator=0
wscale=3] 4:4 seq=2463010534

State table:
self tcp src_addr[50400] -> dst_addr[22]   ESTABLISHED:ESTABLISHED
